methodology.summary: Readiness scores combine measured provincial firm-count signal, national R&D performer context, and source coverage. Non-normalized layers are shown as explicit gaps, not placeholders.
caveats: Scores are directional public-data indices, not procurement advice or claims of classified capability.
Company-level targeting and personal contact fields are intentionally excluded.
Labour, export, and procurement layers are catalogued in v1 but not yet normalized into regional scores.

missions.name: Arctic ISR Drones
missions.description: Uncrewed aerial, space, sensor, communications, and autonomy capacity relevant to Arctic intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance.

nationalSignals.label: Northern overlay
nationalSignals.value: Broadband and remote energy datasets catalogued, not normalized

missions.name: Secure Communications
missions.description: Secure cloud, high-assurance communications, command-and-control, cybersecurity, and communications equipment capacity.

nationalSignals.label: Sovereign capability category
nationalSignals.value: Digital Systems: Secure Cloud, AI, Quantum, C4I, high-assurance communications equipment

missions.name: Naval Autonomy
missions.description: Autonomous surface and underwater systems, naval sensors, ship systems, engineering, and simulation capacity.

nationalSignals.label: Sovereign capability category
nationalSignals.value: Specialized Manufacturing: Land Vehicles / Surface Ships, including Icebreakers and Marine Systems

nationalSignals.label: ITB relevance
nationalSignals.value: Public ITB policy motivates defence-sector investments and Canadian supplier development
